title: 20W LED Rechargeable Work Light, Super Bright 900LM Portable Magnetic COB Floodlight with 4 Modes & 4 Brightness Levels, Waterproof 360° Rotatable USB Lamp for Outdoor, Camping, Car Repair, Emergency
features: 4 Modes & 4 Brightness Levels: Easily switch between four light modes with adjustable brightness levels (weak, medium, strong, ultra-bright) to suit any task or environment, from detailed repairs to outdoor camping.
Mini & Portable Design: Compact and lightweight, this rechargeable work light is easy to carry and store, perfect for tight spaces, travel, or emergency kits.

360° Rotatable & Magnetic Base: Flexible rotation allows you to direct light precisely where needed. The strong magnetic base securely attaches to metal surfaces, freeing your hands for more efficient work.
Reliable USB Charging & Long Battery Life: Built-in 1200mAh rechargeable battery supports hours of continuous use. Convenient USB charging makes recharging simple wherever you go.

IPX6 Waterproof & Durable Construction: With an IPX6 waterproof rating, this work light withstands powerful water jets and tough outdoor conditions, making it ideal for garage, camping, hiking, and emergency situations.
description: Product Description Mini LED Rechargeable Work Light: Enjoy multiple brightness levels and portable lighting anywhere. Ultra Lightweight & Portable Weighing only 84g with a compact size of 65 × 30 × 70 mm, this mini work light is easy to carry and fits conveniently into pockets, bags, or small spaces. 360° Rotatable Stand Adjust the light direction effortlessly with full 360-degree rotation, ensuring perfect illumination angles for any task or environment. Strong Magnetic Design Features a strong magnetic base that securely attaches to metal surfaces, enabling convenient hands-free operation wherever you need it.
